messages.content:
edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: I am amazed at how precise is the justice system of God.
And thinking what would be my future after death although
I know that I supposed to go to the fifth universe.
Gabriel immediately says, “You should never despair of
the mighty mercy of God and remember that you are going
to the fifth world later, and there are chances for you to rise
to higher and higher positions.”
Gabriel is about to leave me when he adds, “There are
still some missions you might voluntarily be interested to
take part in them at the second and third universe that I let
you know when their times come. Moreover, remember that
you have only experienced a tiny portion of life and a few
personalities of existence in these gigantic universes.”

I am astounded by the impeccable precision of God's justice system. As I contemplate my impending future after death, my understanding of being destined for the fifth universe fuels my curiosity. 

With an air of reassurance, Gabriel interjects, emphasizing the unwavering mercy of the divine. He reminds me that my journey to the fifth world holds countless opportunities for advancement, urging me never to lose hope.

Just as Gabriel is preparing to depart, he adds, "There are other missions that may pique your interest in the second and third universes. When the time comes, I will inform you of these endeavors. Furthermore, keep in mind that you have only scratched the surface of life's vast expanse, acquainted with but a mere fraction of the countless complexities that dwell within these majestic universes."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: When I get home, Carol is gardening as usual in front
of the main house; this is her private garden as big as 2000
square feet on her father’s farm of 2000 acres.
I get off the new space car that the agency has leased for
me recently and then say hello, warmly, to Carol.
Carol smiles, and says, “Well, it seems that you had a
good day.”
I say, “Well, I had a small chat with Gabriel on the way
back home.”
“Beautiful,” she says. “What has happened between you
two?”
I say, “Well, I think, there are still some trainings left
for me to take.”
Carol asks me, surprisingly, “What kind of training. Is
it dangerous?”
I answer, “I do not think so, he didn’t say so.”

As I arrive at the main house, Carol can be found engrossed in her usual gardening routine. Her personal sanctuary, spanning a vast 2000 square feet, sits within the expansive confines of her father's 2000-acre farm.

Carefully stepping out of the recently leased space car provided by the agency, I warmly greet Carol. A smile graces her face as she responds, "Seems like you had a good day."

Returning her smile, I mention, "I had a brief conversation with Gabriel on the way home."

With genuine curiosity, Carol inquires, "Interesting! What transpired between the two of you?"

Contemplating for a moment, I reply, "It appears there are still some training sessions I have yet to undergo."

Carol's surprise is evident as she questions, "What sort of training? Is it dangerous?"

Shaking my head, I reassure her, "I believe not. Gabriel did not indicate any potential hazards."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: We go to the main house for dinner. Carol’s mother tells
me that Grandpa has left you a message to call him as soon
as you get home.
I ask, “He didn’t say what?”
Carol’s mom says no, he just said call him. I get curious
and immediately call my parents’ home where my grandpa
lives.
Grandpa answers the phone and says, “We are planning
to come to the farm for the coming weekend.”
I am more curious now than before I called him. I tell
Carol, “They are coming here, but how come they said
nothing to your mom.”
Carol smiles and says, “Well, you know Grandpa. He
wanted to tell you personally that he is coming for you, and
possibly there is something concerning your meeting with
his highness Gabriel today.”
I nod as a sign of acknowledgment. But I still have my
doubts about what Carol said.
I am reluctant to call my grandpa again and ask him
about his strange phone call, whereas I know that there
should be some reasons behind what I will find out later on
the coming weekend.

We gather together in the main house for dinner. Carol's mother shares with me that my grandfather has left a message, urgently requesting me to call him as soon as I arrive home.

Naturally inquisitive, I inquire, "Did he mention the reason for his call?"

Carol's mother shakes her head, indicating that no specific details were mentioned, only to call him immediately. Intrigued by the mystery surrounding the message, I decide to waste no time and promptly dial the number, reaching the residence where my grandparents reside.

On the other end, my grandfather's voice greets me, informing, "We have made plans to visit the farm this upcoming weekend."

This revelation only serves to deepen my curiosity. I share with Carol, "They are coming here, but it's strange that they didn't inform your mother."

Offering an understanding smile, Carol explains, "Well, you know Grandpa. He wanted to personally inform you about their visit, and there might be something he wishes to discuss regarding your encounter with his highness, Gabriel."

I nod, acknowledging her words. Despite this, a seed of doubt lingers within me concerning Carol's explanation.

Reluctant to call my grandfather once again to inquire about the cryptic phone call and unsure of what secrets await me during the upcoming weekend, I deliberate internally, knowing there must be a valid reason for the enigma I am about to uncover.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: Today is Saturday, and Grandpa and my parents have
arrived here on the farm the day before, on Friday
afternoon. I have not yet got a chance to talk with my
grandpa.
After breakfast, Grandpa asks me to come to his room
and starts immediately talking, “I know that his holiness
Gabriel might send you to the second and third universes
for a mission. I called to make sure that you will be at home
for the weekend.”
Grandpa continues, “As you may know, the priority in
the first universe where we are, is self. Meaning that
everyone is struggling to save herself or himself although,
in the other universes, life is going on the same, and humans
have supremacy over other species; but the rules are not the
same as in here.
“For instance, the priorities in the second universe and
the third, the fourth, the fifth, the sixth, and the seventh are
different.”

It is a Saturday morning, and both my parents and Grandpa arrived at the farm the previous afternoon. Due to the hectic nature of their arrival, I haven't had the chance to converse with my grandfather yet.

Following breakfast, Grandpa beckons me to his quarters, wasting no time as he begins to speak, "I am aware that his holiness, Gabriel, may be sending you on a mission to the second and third universes. Hence, I called to ensure you would be available this weekend."

Grandpa continues, "As you may already know, the first universe, our current realm, places utmost importance on self-preservation. Here, every individual struggles to save themselves. However, in the other universes, life continues similarly, with humanity holding a position of dominance over other species. But, the rules governing these realms differ significantly."

"For instance," he explains, "the priorities within the second and third universes, as well as the fourth, fifth, sixth, and seventh, diverge significantly from those in our own universe."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: I do not understand a word of what my grandpa said a
few seconds ago. At the same time, Gabriel appears and
says, “Well I preferred your grandfather fully explain where you
are going and what are the rules in the other universes.”
“However, it is quite clear to me, you have not yet
perceived how the system works. It’s difficult to
understand, of course. When you live in the First World, on
the planet Earth, the reflection of the six different rules of
survival in the six worlds above, affects you plus the laws
of the first universe.” Grandpa continues.
Then Gabriel says, “Be ready to come with me to the
second universe for a mission of forty years, and then you
are to practice life in there until you understand completely
what we said.”
“Moreover; you should not worry about the length of
your time that will live there. As you have experienced
before, it would only take a few minutes of your lifetime on
Earth,” he continues.

My grandpa's words leave me utterly perplexed, and before I can make sense of it all, Gabriel materializes beside us. "I would have preferred your grandfather to fully elaborate on your destination and the regulations governing the other universes," Gabriel comments.

"Notably, it is abundantly clear to me that you have yet to grasp how the system operates. Understandably, it is no easy task," Gabriel continues, his voice tinged with understanding. "As an inhabitant of the First World, residing on planet Earth, the influence of the six distinct sets of survival regulations in the realms above, along with the laws of the first universe, impact you."

Grandpa resumes speaking, conveying Gabriel's words, "Prepare yourself to journey alongside me into the second universe. You will undertake a mission lasting forty years, allowing you ample time to acquaint yourself with life there until complete comprehension is achieved."

Gabriel interjects once more, reassuring me, "Additionally, you need not fret about the length of time you will spend in that realm. As you have previously experienced, what may appear as years there will merely consume mere minutes of your life on Earth."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: Immediately after Gabriel finishes his speech, I fall on
the couch just like someone who is unconscious or under
drugs. Then I feel, I am swelling like a balloon, while I am
watching the farm from the above and going up farther from
Earth.
And then we go through the firewall between the first
and second universes. I feel my astral body is burning for a
few moments and then suddenly find myself as a newborn
child in a small but very well-educated family. I look at
myself and feel sad first, and then it is funny that I find
myself as a thirty-six years old mature man in the body of
an infant a few seconds later.

As Gabriel's words reach their conclusion, an overwhelming sensation engulfs me, causing me to collapse onto the couch, resembling someone unconscious or influenced by potent drugs. In this strange state, I witness an extraordinary occurrence: my body begins to swell, resembling a balloon, while my vantage point shifts higher and farther above the Earth, gazing down at the farm.

Passing through the firewall that separates the first and second universes, an unsettling burn engulfs my astral body for a fleeting moment. Abruptly, I find myself reborn into a small yet intellectually accomplished family. Gazing at my infant form, a sense of melancholy washes over me, swiftly replaced by the absurdity of being a mature, thirty-six-year-old man encapsulated within the vessel of an innocent child, all within a matter of seconds.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: Gabriel appears immediately to me and says, “Say
nothing, or even don’t blink that could reveal who you are,
otherwise you might ruin the purpose of your mission.”
My new mom comes close to me when talking to her
husband, says, “Rob, we have picked out the best genes in
the incubator.”
“Yes, I believe so, this baby will have a wonderful
future,” says Rob.

Without delay, Gabriel manifests before me, cautioning, "Remain silent and refrain from any actions or revealing glances that could potentially divulge your true identity. Doing so may jeopardize the mission's purpose."

My new mother draws near as she converses with her husband, uttering in an excited tone, "Rob, we have carefully selected the finest genes from the incubator."

Rob, her husband, responds with confidence, "Indeed, I wholeheartedly believe this child will have a remarkable future ahead."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: I grow up as a brilliant student in my school and
understand gradually that the priority in this universe is
family, which is the same as race. Every person in each
community, as a school or family, helps other members of
the family for improvement of the entire family.
I am smarter than the average of my classmates, since I
am more experienced spiritually (the Knight of the Fourth
Universe). I help some students in my class, regarding their
syllabus and subjects, until the time, they can sync with the
rest of the students.
There is no competition among members of each race
(family), but there are some who are more qualified in their
professions and kindly are ready to help others in their
family.

As I progress through my education, it becomes evident that family holds paramount importance in this universe, akin to one's race. Within every community, whether it be a school or a family unit, members work harmoniously to uplift and better the collective whole.

My intellectual prowess surpasses that of my peers, for I possess a profound spiritual outlook as the Knight of the Fourth Universe. Leveraging this wisdom, I extend a helping hand to fellow classmates, supporting them in their studies and assisting them until they achieve synchronization with the rest of the students.

Competition is non-existent among members of each race, each family. Instead, individuals who excel in their respective fields willingly lend their expertise to aid and assist others within their familial unit.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: My new father is an electronics engineer, and my new
mother is a genetic scientist, and I am dreaming of
becoming a spaceship pilot.
Some families are fewer in numbers but smarter and
more advanced in technology and science.
I belong to a family (race) who are few in numbers but
too advanced in sciences and technology.
There are three other races (families) in the second
universe, beside my family.

In my newfound life, my father is an accomplished electronics engineer, while my mother is a brilliant genetic scientist. Despite their impressive professions, my aspirations soar beyond conventional boundaries as I dream of becoming a skilled spaceship pilot.

Within this realm, some families are smaller in size, yet they possess an exceptional level of intelligence and technological advancement. I am fortunate to belong to one such family, known for our profound understanding of science and cutting-edge technologies.

However, it is important to note that my family is just one of four races, or families, within the vast expanse of the second universe. Each race possesses unique qualities, contributing to the diverse tapestry of this extraordinary realm.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel: There is one family, who has dominated a few galaxies,
and their numbers go up to billions, but they are
technologically primitive. They are aggressive businessmen
and overwhelm other families’ (races) rights every time
they get a chance.
This family reminds me of the complicated social life of
some races of ants on the earth who invade other ants’
belongings without mercy.
One of two other families (races) are capable in sports,
social and entertainment enterprises, and the third is good
in environmental-friendly industries.

Among the races that populate the second universe, there exists a particular family that has laid claim to several galaxies. Their vast numbers reach into the billions, yet their technological advancements remain primitive. Unfortunately, this family displays an aggressive nature, often trampling upon the rights of other races whenever the opportunity arises. Their behavior mirrors the complex social dynamics observed among certain ant species on Earth, where merciless invasions disrupt the belongings of their fellow ants.

In contrast, one of the two remaining families excels in various fields, such as sports, social interaction, and entertainment ventures. Their prowess extends far beyond mere physical abilities, encompassing a range of enterprises that cater to the diverse interests of the second universe.

Lastly, the third family possesses remarkable proficiency in developing and nurturing environmentally-friendly industries. They prioritize sustainability and harmonious coexistence with the realm they inhabit, leveraging their knowledge to make positive contributions to the collective well-being of the second universe.
